title: Affected-Person Review Safeguards and Evidence Boundary
prohibited_collection: Current crisis disclosures through a general review form
Medical, psychiatric, legal, immigration, financial, or school records not required for the review
Passwords, account credentials, device contents, or private messages
Evidence about a third party who has not been informed or authorized
required_safeguards: Consent and assent appropriate to participant and jurisdiction
Right to skip questions, stop, withdraw, and request deletion
No service, benefit, grade, treatment, or access consequence for refusal
Separate key for contact and review evidence when contact data is necessary
Role-based access and restricted evidence handling
Distress and safeguarding response that does not promise emergency care
No automated model training or product personalization from review evidence
